notes: Model GSM4248PX. Port data cross-confirmed across multiple secondary sources (NetGuardStore, MediaCastSys, Creation Networks, Dell, Netgear product pages, CDW). Authoritative Netgear product page (netgear.com/business/wired/switches/fully-managed/gsm4248px/) and support page did not render spec tables via WebFetch. Key details confirmed: 40x RJ45 PoE+, 8x SFP+, 1x out-of-band RJ45 management, 1x USB-C console, 1x RJ45/RS232 console, 1x USB-A storage, IEC C14 power inlet, 1U rack form factor. The RJ45 console port carries RS232 signaling (Cisco-style rollover/straight-through to DB9 adapter included). Ports 1–40 and SFP+ 1–8 are represented as single entries each due to repetition; physical panel has 48 discrete port apertures total. Power connector is an IEC C14 inlet (mapped to 'iec' in controlled list).

ports.name: PoE+ Port 1–40
ports.note: 40x 10/100/1000BASE-T PoE+ ports (802.3at), 960W total PoE budget, rear-facing for clean AV rack integration

ports.name: Console (USB-C)
ports.note: USB-C console port for CLI management; included cable: USB-C to USB-A 2.0

ports.name: Console (RJ45)
ports.note: RJ45 RS232 serial console port; included cable: RJ45 straight-through to DB9. Closest controlled-list connector is rj45 (carries RS232 signaling via Cisco-style rollover cable).

ports.name: USB-A Storage
ports.note: 1x USB-A port for configuration files, logs, and firmware images

ports.name: AC In
ports.note: IEC C14 inlet with on/off switch; uses standard IEC C13-to-C14 power cord
